about.title: AI automation backed by production engineering.
about.copy: App Engineer at Egen with experience delivering AI-powered automation, enterprise web applications, cloud deployments, and service integrations. I pair Python and Java engineering with Google Cloud infrastructure, Angular interfaces, and a practical focus on measurable outcomes. I hold a B.Tech in Electronics and Communication Engineering from IIIT Sri City with an 8.92/10 GPA.

principles.title: Intelligent automation
principles.text: Designing agent workflows and document pipelines that reduce repetitive work while preserving context and accuracy.

principles.title: Cloud-native delivery
principles.text: Building and operating scalable services with Google Cloud, Docker, Cloud Run, Cloud Build, and CI/CD.

principles.title: Production reliability
principles.text: Modernizing systems, improving test coverage, and integrating secure enterprise platforms for dependable delivery.

capabilities: Building AI agents and intelligent document workflows with Python, ADK, Gemini, and Google Drive APIs.
Developing Angular and Spring Boot applications with RESTful APIs and secure enterprise access patterns.
Deploying containerized workloads through Google Cloud, Cloud Run, Cloud Build, and CI/CD pipelines.
Integrating ServiceNow, Dialogflow CX, Discovery Engine, Google Maps, ArcGIS, and DeckGL.
Designing machine-learning systems for classification, forecasting, and real-time IoT monitoring.
priorities: Creating AI systems that produce measurable reductions in manual effort.
Keeping cloud services secure, observable, testable, and easy to evolve.
Connecting backend reliability with clear, useful application experiences.

workingStyle.label: Working style
workingStyle.text: I focus on the complete delivery path: clarify the workflow, design dependable services, integrate the right platforms, test thoroughly, and measure the operational result.

projects.title: Stress Classification and Vital Signs Forecasting
projects.category: IoT healthcare and machine learning research
projects.summary: An IoT-based health monitoring system that combines sensor data, analytics, and machine learning to track patient vitals and support proactive healthcare decisions.
projects.challenge: Continuously monitor health signals while identifying stress and forecasting critical vital signs from real-time sensor data.
projects.delivery: Built the analytics and machine-learning workflow in Python with Firestore, using a hypertuned random forest for stress classification and neural networks for pulse and SpO2 forecasting.
projects.impact: Achieved 94.3% stress-classification accuracy and produced an IEEE-published system for real-time health monitoring and vital-sign forecasting.

experiences.title: Egen, Hyderabad
experiences.summary: Delivered SowCraft Agent, an AI automation product that transforms meeting notes and Google Drive uploads into populated SOW templates, reducing manual effort by 60%. Built JSON-based gap analysis, automated template copying, context-aware insertion, and dynamic table updates with 85% requirement-identification accuracy. Upgraded the solution from Gemini 2.5 Flash to Pro, designed scalable GCP infrastructure, and established production testing protocols.

experiences.title: Egen, Hyderabad
experiences.summary: Developed Spring Boot APIs and Angular integrations that improved UI-server synchronization by 30%. Implemented Identity-Aware Proxy, supported an Angular 9-to-16 upgrade, built ArcGIS and DeckGL species-movement visualizations that improved Wildlife Tracker functionality by 40%, and created a Cloud Build CI/CD pipeline that reduced deployment time by 40%.

experiences.title: Egen, Hyderabad
experiences.summary: Modernized a Java 8 application to Java 21 for a 25% performance and compatibility improvement, deployed Angular-Spring Boot services with Docker and Cloud Run to reduce downtime by 20%, and built ServiceNow, Dialogflow CX, Google Maps, and Discovery Engine integrations that improved ticket workflows, user engagement, and search accuracy.

experiences.title: Egen, Hyderabad
experiences.summary: Developed a Python and Dialogflow chatbot for driver and vehicle services across four languages, increasing engagement by 25%. Improved testing efficiency by 30% with automated Botium test generation and execution, and resolved all assigned VDH-VAxMax Angular, Python, and PostgreSQL service tickets for vaccine-management workflows.

experiences.title: Centre of Excellence in Wireless Technology, Chennai
experiences.summary: Engineered a C++ QoS enforcement module for a 5G environment, improving network-traffic management and service-quality controls while developing hands-on knowledge of 5G architecture, procedure call flows, and QoS models.

experiences.title: Indian Institute of Information Technology, Sri City
experiences.summary: Completed a Bachelor of Technology in Electronics and Communication Engineering with a GPA of 8.92/10.
